Mid City, New Orleans

Studio Services

Everything your sound needs

From raw tracking to final master — a full creative home in the heart of New Orleans.

Studio Recording

World-class tracking room with vintage and modern gear. Isolation booth, full live room, and Donny's legendary ears at the board.

Learn more

Mixing & Mastering

Hollywood-grade mixing from the man who shaped platinum records. Your vision, refined to its fullest potential.

Learn more

Artist Development

More than a room — a creative partnership. Donny helps emerging artists find and sharpen their sound.

Learn more
Donny Markowitz
Replace with photo
The Legacy

Five decades of
timeless craft

Donny Markowitz began his journey in New York's golden session era — crafting arrangements for artists who would define American music. His path led through Hollywood, three Oscar nominations, and decades of platinum records.

Today, Donny channels all of that expertise into Mid City Sound Studios in New Orleans — a space where emerging artists meet living legend.

Full Story

Do It Again

Artist Voices

What artists say

“Walking into Mid City Sound feels like stepping into music history. Donny's ear is unmatched.”

— Session artist (placeholder)

“The room has a sound. And Donny knows exactly how to use it. Best studio experience I've had in New Orleans.”

— Producer, New Orleans (placeholder)

“We flew in from LA just to track here. Worth every mile.”

— Recording artist (placeholder)

Ready to make
something timeless?

Studio sessions are available by appointment. Full upfront payment secures your date — subject to Donny & Flu's approval.
